pi_items.source: task.json description explicitly lists these four subtasks with matching subjects, trackers, priorities, and estimated hours.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a parent issue titled 'Office Renovation Phase 1 - Structural and Compliance' within the 'facilities-renovation' project, which is automatically set up by the initialization script. The parent issue must have four specific subtasks linked to it, exactly as requested in the prompt: 'Site survey and as-built documentation' (Bug, High priority, 16 hours), 'Structural load analysis and engineering review' (Feature, High priority, 40 hours), 'Environmental and hazardous materials assessment' (Support, Normal priority, 24 hours), and 'Preliminary design and cost estimation report' (Feature, Normal priority, 32 hours).
